languages.text: "Милорд, это отпрыск Гапраков. Не уверена, что нам стоит {mf|ему|ей} доверять".

traits.locale_text: "Милорд, это отпрыск Гапраков. Не уверена, что нам стоит ему доверять".

languages.text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."
languages.original_text: "Милорд, это отпрыск Гапраков. Не уверена, что нам стоит {mf|ему|ей} доверять".

traits.locale_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."
"My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."
"My lord, it's Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust him."
"My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."
"My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."
"My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

languages.text: “大人，{mf|他|她}是贾帕克家的人。我不确定我们是否该信任{mf|他|她}。”
languages.original_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: “大人，{mf|他|她}是贾帕克家的人。我不确定我们是否该信任{mf|他|她}。”

languages.text: « Mon seigneur, {mf|il|elle} appartient à la maison Gaprak. Je ne suis pas sûre qu'il soit sage de lui faire confiance. »
languages.original_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: « Mon seigneur, {mf|il|elle} appartient à la maison Gaprak. Je ne suis pas sûre qu'il soit sage de lui faire confiance. »

languages.text: "Lordum, Gaprak Hanesi'nden bu. Ona güvenebileceğimizden emin değilim."
languages.original_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: "Lordum, Gaprak Hanesi'nden bu. Ona güvenebileceğimizden emin değilim."

languages.text: «Mi señor, es miembro de la casa Gaprak. No sé si deberíamos confiar en {mf|él|ella}».
languages.original_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: «Mi señor, es miembro de la casa Gaprak. No sé si deberíamos confiar en {mf|él|ella}».

languages.text: "Mylord, {mf|er|sie} gehört zu Haus Gaprak. Ich bin nicht sicher, ob wir {mf|ihm|ihr} trauen sollten."
languages.original_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: "Mylord, {mf|er|sie} gehört zu Haus Gaprak. Ich bin nicht sicher, ob wir {mf|ihm|ihr} trauen sollten."

languages.text: 「殿、{mf|彼|彼女}はガプラク家の者です。{mf|彼|彼女}を信用すべきかどうかはわかりません。」
languages.original_text: "My lord, {mf|he|she} is of House Gaprak. I'm not sure we should trust {mf|him|her}."

traits.locale_text: 「殿、{mf|彼|彼女}はガプラク家の者です。{mf|彼|彼女}を信用すべきかどうかはわかりません。」
